name: internal-comms-anthropic
description: A set of resources to help me write all kinds of internal communications, using the formats that my company likes to use. Claude should use this skill whenever asked to write some sort of internal ...
capabilities: Write 3P updates (Progress, Plans, Problems) in strict format
Create company-wide newsletters with proper structure
Draft FAQ responses based on employee questions
Handle general internal communications with proper tone
author: sickn33
securitySummary: All 19 static findings are false positives. The scanner misidentified license text as cryptographic algorithms, writing style guidance as system reconnaissance, standard license URLs as hardcoded URLs, and markdown formatting as shell backticks. This is a pure text-based writing assistant skill with no executable code, network calls, or file operations.
valueStatement: This skill provides templates and guidelines for writing professional internal communications in formats your company prefers. It structures updates so you can focus on content quality.
limitations: Does not generate information from tools - only structures provided input
Requires user to supply the actual content to communicate
Cannot access company systems to gather data automatically
Formatting templates are fixed and cannot be customized without editing skill files

useCases.title: Team Lead Weekly Updates
useCases.description: Write concise weekly 3P updates for executives showing team progress, plans, and blockers

useCases.title: Company Newsletter Creation
useCases.description: Create monthly company-wide newsletters summarizing key updates across all departments

useCases.title: Internal FAQ Documentation
useCases.description: Generate frequently asked question documents based on employee concerns and company events

promptTemplates.title: Basic 3P Update
promptTemplates.prompt: Write a 3P update for the [team name] team covering last week. Include what they accomplished (Progress), what they plan to do next week (Plans), and any blockers (Problems).

promptTemplates.title: Company Newsletter
promptTemplates.prompt: Write a company-wide newsletter using the following updates: [paste updates]. Format it with sections for announcements, progress highlights, and leadership messages.

promptTemplates.title: FAQ Document
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a FAQ document addressing these common questions: [list questions]. Provide clear, concise answers based on company policy.

promptTemplates.title: General Communication
promptTemplates.prompt: Write an internal communication about [topic]. The audience is [audience]. The tone should be [formal/casual/urgent]. Include any relevant links.

bestPractices: Always confirm the team name and time period before writing 3P updates
Keep each section of a 3P update to 1-3 sentences maximum
Use company-preferred formatting and tone from the skill templates
antiPatterns: Do not include granular team details in company-wide newsletters
Avoid writing communications without knowing the target audience
Never skip clarification when the communication type does not match existing templates

faq.question: What communication formats does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill supports 3P updates (Progress, Plans, Problems), company newsletters, FAQ responses, and general internal communications.

faq.question: Does this skill access my company data?
faq.answer: No. This skill only structures content you provide. It does not have access to Slack, email, or documents unless you grant those tools and provide the content.

faq.question: Can I customize the output format?
faq.answer: The format templates are defined in the skill files. You can edit those files to customize formats for your company needs.

faq.question: What is a 3P update?
faq.answer: 3P stands for Progress, Plans, and Problems. It is a concise weekly update format for teams to share accomplishments, upcoming work, and blockers with leadership.

faq.question: How long should a 3P update be?
faq.answer: Each section should be 1-3 sentences. The entire update should be readable in 30-60 seconds.

faq.question: Can this skill write communications without input?
faq.answer: No. This skill structures and formats communications but requires you to provide the actual content and information to communicate.
